'''Threndy''' was a nurse who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. She survived the attack of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces against the medical center, and the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|RMSU]] was moved to a new location. When the Republic forces discovered that the [[Bota/Legends|bota]] had no use any more, Threndy and the whole personnel left Drongar.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1st}}
